text: I just got to Guatemala on vacation and currently I'm in Guatemala City and just like many cities there's not many trees here but I'm gonna look around and see what fruits I can find so come with me. Even though there aren't as many trees as the mountains were the rainforest I still think we might find some stuff here. It didn't take long before I came across the first fruit tree of the day. If you look closely you can actually see some oranges through these branches and just a little while after that it came across all of these little raspberries. For this next one you're gonna have to look pretty close but up at the top of this papaya tree you can actually see one little fruit. Then after walking around a bit more I decided to look up and I ended up finding this avocado tree that had so so many avocados up there. I think this is the most I've ever seen in a tree this size. After that I came across another small citrus tree I think this might also be an orange and after that I came across a monstera deliciosa plant that grew right over this wall and if you look up there you can see one fruit. And last but not least right on the side of the road here I found a coffee plant loaded with coffee cherries which was so cool to see because it was right in the middle of the city. I'll definitely keep you guys posted because this is just the first stop of many and until next time get outside and see what you can find.
